name:
fun FaceCaptureView(session: FaceCaptureSession, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, configuration: FaceCaptureViewConfiguration = FaceCaptureViewConfiguration(LocalContext.current), preview: (imageFlow: MutableSharedFlow<IImage>, width: Dp, height: Dp, scaledFaceTrackingResult: FaceTrackingResult, cameraTransform: GraphicsLayerScope.() -> Unit) -> Unit = { imageFlow, width, height, scaledFaceTrackingResult, cameraTransform ->
        CameraPreviewView(
            imageSharedFlow = imageFlow,
            modifier = Modifier
                .size(
                    width = width,
                    height = height
                )
                .clip(
                    FaceOval(scaledFaceTrackingResult)
                )
                .graphicsLayer(cameraTransform),
            useBackCamera = configuration.useBackCamera
        )
    }, onResult: (FaceCaptureSessionResult) -> Unit = {})
searchKeys:
fun FaceCaptureView(session: FaceCaptureSession, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, configuration: FaceCaptureViewConfiguration = FaceCaptureViewConfiguration(LocalContext.current), preview: (imageFlow: MutableSharedFlow<IImage>, width: Dp, height: Dp, scaledFaceTrackingResult: FaceTrackingResult, cameraTransform: GraphicsLayerScope.() -> Unit) -> Unit = { imageFlow, width, height, scaledFaceTrackingResult, cameraTransform ->
